findings.title: Lost-update in recordFailure/markSent — compare-and-set + status guard added
etims-retry job declared no cron — added cron '* * * * *' for registry parity
AC1 producer gap — nothing enqueues a failed submission; receipt lost when KRA down
No atomic claim of due rows — double-submit to KRA under multi-instance
registerEtimsRetryJob never called — systemic jobs boot/deploy story
